criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance learning experiences.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The app's ability to tailor content and learning paths to individual user needs.

criteria.name: Subject Coverage
criteria.description: The range of educational subjects and topics the app addresses.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The effectiveness of the app in maintaining user interest and participation.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: The app's availability across different platforms and its ease of use for diverse user groups.
